mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS WHERE STATUS IN ('APPROVED', 'PARTIALLY_APPROVED')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT R.RECEIPT_ID FROM RECEIPTS R JOIN PURCHASE_ORDERS PO ON R.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID JOIN STORES S ON PO.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID JOIN RECEIPT_ITEMS RI ON R.RECEIPT_ID = RI.RECEIPT_ID
WHERE 1 = 1
AND TRUNC(R.RECEIVED_AT) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(R.RECEIVED_AT) <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND S.STORE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
GROUP BY R.RECEIPT_ID
HAVING ( #{receiptType} IS NULL OR #{receiptType} = '' OR #{receiptType} = 'ALL' OR ( #{receiptType} = 'NORMAL' AND SUM( CASE WHEN NVL(RI.DEFECT_QUANTITY, 0) <> 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) = 0 ) OR ( (#{receiptType} = 'DEFECT' OR #{receiptType} = 'DIFFERENCE') AND SUM( CASE WHEN NVL(RI.DEFECT_QUANTITY, 0) <> 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) > 0 ) ) )

SELECT PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID AS purchaseOrderId , PO.TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount , PO.STATUS AS status , PO.CREATED_AT AS createdAt
, MIN(POI.MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT) || CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN ' 외 ' || (COUNT(*) - 1) || '건' ELSE '' END AS materialSummary FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS PO JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS POI ON PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID WHERE PO.STATUS IN ('APPROVED', 'PARTIALLY_APPROVED')
AND PO.STATUS = #{status}
GROUP BY PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID , PO.TOTAL_AMOUNT , PO.ORDER_MEMO , PO.STATUS , PO.CREATED_AT , PO.UPDATED_AT , PO.STORE_ID ORDER BY PO.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT R.RECEIPT_ID AS receiptId,
'R' || TO_CHAR(R.RECEIVED_AT, 'YYYY') || LPAD(R.RECEIPT_ID, 4, '0') AS receiptCode,
R.RECEIPT_MEMO AS receiptMemo, R.RECEIVED_AT AS receivedAt, R.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID AS purchaseOrderId,
S.STORE_NAME AS storeName,
MIN(POI.MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT) || CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN ' 외 ' || (COUNT(*) - 1) || '건' ELSE '' END AS materialSummary,
CASE WHEN SUM( CASE WHEN NVL(RI.DEFECT_QUANTITY, 0) <> 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) > 0 THEN 'DIFFERENCE' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS receiptStatus
FROM RECEIPTS R JOIN PURCHASE_ORDERS PO ON R.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID JOIN STORES S ON PO.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID JOIN RECEIPT_ITEMS RI ON R.RECEIPT_ID = RI.RECEIPT_ID JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS POI ON RI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEM_ID = POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEM_ID
WHERE 1 = 1
AND TRUNC(R.RECEIVED_AT) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(R.RECEIVED_AT) <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND S.STORE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
GROUP BY R.RECEIPT_ID, R.RECEIPT_MEMO, R.RECEIVED_AT, R.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID, S.STORE_NAME
HAVING ( #{receiptType} IS NULL OR #{receiptType} = '' OR #{receiptType} = 'ALL' OR ( #{receiptType} = 'NORMAL' AND SUM( CASE WHEN NVL(RI.DEFECT_QUANTITY, 0) <> 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) = 0 ) OR ( (#{receiptType} = 'DEFECT' OR #{receiptType} = 'DIFFERENCE') AND SUM( CASE WHEN NVL(RI.DEFECT_QUANTITY, 0) <> 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) > 0 ) )
ORDER BY R.RECEIPT_ID DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_RECEIPT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO RECEIPTS ( RECEIPT_ID, RECEIPT_MEMO, RECEIVED_AT, PURCHASE_ORDER_ID ) VALUES ( #{receiptId}, #{receiptMemo}, SYSDATE, #{purchaseOrderId} )

INSERT INTO RECEIPT_ITEMS ( RECEIPT_ITEM_ID, RECEIVED_QUANTITY, DEFECT_QUANTITY, RECEIPT_ITEM_MEMO, RECEIPT_ID, PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEM_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_RECEIPT_ITEM.NEXTVAL, #{receivedQuantity}, #{defectQuantity}, #{receiptItemMemo}, #{receiptId}, #{purchaseOrderItemId} )

SELECT SEQ_INV_TX.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO INVENTORY_TRANSACTIONS ( INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID, TRANSACTION_TYPE, REASON, TRANSACTION_MEMO, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, STORE_ID, RECEIPT_ID, STORE_CLOSING_ID ) VALUES ( #{inventoryTransactionId}, 'RECEIPT', '발주 입고 처리', NULL, SYSDATE, #{createdBy}, #{storeId}, #{receiptId}, NULL )

INSERT INTO INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ITEMS ( INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ITEM_ID, BEFORE_QUANTITY, AFTER_QUANTITY, INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID, STORE_INVENTORY_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_INV_TX_ITEM.NEXTVAL, #{beforeQuantity}, #{afterQuantity}, #{inventoryTransactionId}, #{storeInventoryId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE PURCHASE_ORDERS SET STATUS = 'RECEIVED', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = #{purchaseOrderId}
mapper.select:
SELECT R.RECEIPT_ID AS receiptId,
'R' || TO_CHAR(R.RECEIVED_AT, 'YYYY') || LPAD(R.RECEIPT_ID, 4, '0') AS receiptCode,
'P' || TO_CHAR(PO.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY') || LPAD(PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID, 4, '0') AS purchaseCode,
R.RECEIPT_MEMO AS receiptMemo, R.RECEIVED_AT AS receivedAt, R.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID AS purchaseOrderId,
S.STORE_NAME AS storeName,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RECEIPT_ITEMS RI WHERE RI.RECEIPT_ID = R.RECEIPT_ID AND NVL(RI.DEFECT_QUANTITY, 0) <> 0 ) THEN 'DIFFERENCE' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS receiptStatus
FROM RECEIPTS R JOIN PURCHASE_ORDERS PO ON R.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID JOIN STORES S ON PO.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID
WHERE R.RECEIPT_ID = #{receiptId}

SELECT M.MATERIAL_CODE AS materialCode, POI.MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT AS materialName, M.MATERIAL_TYPE AS materialType, POI.SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT AS supplyPrice,
POI.REQUEST_QUANTITY AS requestQuantity,
NVL(POI.APPROVED_QUANTITY, POI.REQUEST_QUANTITY) AS approvedQuantity,
NVL(RI.RECEIVED_QUANTITY, 0) AS receivedQuantity, NVL(RI.DEFECT_QUANTITY, 0) AS defectQuantity, NVL(RI.RECEIPT_ITEM_MEMO, '-') AS receiptItemMemo,
POI.SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT * NVL(RI.RECEIVED_QUANTITY, 0) AS amount
FROM RECEIPT_ITEMS RI JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS POI ON RI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEM_ID = POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEM_ID JOIN MATERIALS M ON POI.MATERIAL_ID = M.MATERIAL_ID
WHERE RI.RECEIPT_ID = #{receiptId}
ORDER BY RI.RECEIPT_ITEM_ID

SELECT POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEM_ID AS purchaseOrderItemId, M.MATERIAL_CODE AS materialCode, M.MATERIAL_TYPE AS materialType, POI.MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT AS materialName,
POI.REQUEST_QUANTITY AS requestQuantity,
CASE WHEN PO.STATUS = 'APPROVED' THEN POI.REQUEST_QUANTITY ELSE POI.APPROVED_QUANTITY END AS approvedQuantity,
CASE WHEN PO.STATUS = 'PARTIALLY_APPROVED' THEN POI.REQUEST_QUANTITY - POI.APPROVED_QUANTITY ELSE 0 END AS rejectedQuantity,
CASE WHEN PO.STATUS = 'PARTIALLY_APPROVED' THEN NVL(POI.REJECT_REASON, '-') ELSE '-' END AS rejectReason,
POI.SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT AS supplyPrice,
CASE WHEN PO.STATUS = 'APPROVED' THEN POI.REQUEST_QUANTITY * POI.SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT ELSE POI.APPROVED_QUANTITY * POI.SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT END AS amount
FROM PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS POI JOIN PURCHASE_ORDERS PO ON POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID JOIN MATERIALS M ON POI.MATERIAL_ID = M.MATERIAL_ID WHERE POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = #{purchaseId} AND ( PO.STATUS = 'APPROVED' OR (PO.STATUS = 'PARTIALLY_APPROVED' AND POI.APPROVED_QUANTITY > 0) ) ORDER BY POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEM_ID
